name: Stamp
scaffolding_intent: Entity lifts to reveal a silhouette then snaps back with cracks radiating on impact, reinforcing actual spatial location

parameters.name: liftPixels
parameters.description: How many pixels the entity lifts up

parameters.name: crackCount
parameters.description: Number of crack lines on impact

correction_intent: Child described an incorrect location for the entity
suggestion_intent: Child hasn't mentioned the location of an entity
